Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Normative Hire-to-Retire Process: What is the logical flow? 1. Post Job 2. Screen Candidates 3. Interview 4. Decision 5. Onboard 6. Payroll 7. Close Case. Key Dependencies: Screening before interviewing, Interviewing before Decision, Decision before Onboarding, Onboarding before Payroll, Payroll before Case Close.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze POWL Model 1: Edges: Post -> Screen, Screen -> Decide, Screen -> Interview, Decide -> Onboard, Onboard -> Payroll, Payroll -> Close. Logic Check: Post starts. Good. Post -> Screen. Good. Screen -> Decide. Anomaly 1: You can decide before interviewing. The Partial Order allows path Post -> Screen -> Decide -> Onboard. Skipping interviews entirely.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Severity Model 1: Skipping interviews is a significant deviation. Risks hiring unqualified candidates. However, does not break hire then pay logic.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze POWL Model 2: Edges: Post -> Screen, Post -> Interview, Interview -> Decide, Decide -> loop_onboarding, loop_onboarding -> xor_payroll, xor_payroll -> Close. loop_onboarding = LOOP(Onboard, skip). xor_payroll = XOR(Payroll, skip).

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Anomaly 2: Post -> Interview skips Screening. Anomaly 3: xor_payroll allows skip Payroll. Anomaly 4: loop_onboarding allows skip Onboard. Anomaly 5: Bypasses Screen. Anomaly 6: Multiple onboarding.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Compare Model 1 vs Model 2: Model 1 flaw: Decision without Interview. Strength: Enforces Onboarding -> Payroll -> Close, Post -> Screen. Model 2 flaws: Skips Screening, Onboarding, Payroll optional. Winner: Model 1 better.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refining Logic Self-Correction: Check Model 1: Screen -> Decide and Screen -> Interview, no edge Interview-Decide, so Interview optional. Check Model 2: Post -> Interview bypasses Screen. loop_onboarding: execute Onboard then exit or skip then Onboard, so Onboard at least once.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Correction on Model 2: Onboarding mandatory, Payroll optional via XOR skip. Screening optional. Model 1 enforces Screening and Payroll. Skipping Payroll catastrophic.

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Severity: Model 1 Rushed Hire bad HR practice. Model 2 Ghost Hire illegal fraudulent. Model 1 violates quality control, Model 2 mandatory compliance.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final check Model 1: Decide without Interview confirmed. Model 2: Payroll skippable, Screening optional. Model 1 superior.
